creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
No it's not committed in base at the moment but wireguard did already exist in base before 13.0 and there were a few rc.d scripts already that only needed the wg userland binary to work.

I don't know which situation we will have in the future now that wireguard kmod is being prepared for base but I hope that it will not need anything from ports to work.
